note: Single probe call (temperature=0, max_tokens=1) to recover the snapshot ID that OpenRouter currently routes "anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.5" to. The 49-task toy substrate was generated on 2026-05-15; whether the alias resolved to the SAME snapshot then is irrecoverable — the original generation log (data/_generation_log.jsonl) does not capture response.model. See paper App. B.1.1 and §6.2 for the reproducibility caveat. After this probe was logged the llm.chat() wrapper was patched to expose resolved_model on ChatResult so future generation runs cannot lose this information again.
